title: 10 health benefits of Mentha aquatica (water mint)
intro: Mentha aquatica has health benefits such as alleviating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and calming respiratory problems. Its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds, which help soothe digestive discomfort and relax airway muscles. For instance, a warm tea made from the leaves can ease nausea and indigestion, allowing individuals to enjoy their meals without discomfort. Additionally, inhaling the steam of infused water mint can provide relief for congestion and coughs, promoting a restful night's sleep.
